title: Preorder Information
content: Preorders ship on the listed release date. You will receive a tracking update once the item dispatches.

title: Order Confirmation
content: Order confirmation emails are sent within 5 minutes. Check spam or promotions folders if you do not see it.

title: Tracking Not Updating
content: Tracking updates may pause for 24 hours while carriers process scans. If there is no update after 48 hours, contact support.

title: Failed Delivery Attempt
content: If a delivery attempt fails, the carrier will retry on the next business day. Ensure the delivery address and phone number are correct.

title: Signature Required
content: Some high-value orders require a signature on delivery. If you are unavailable, contact the carrier to reschedule.

title: Return Pickup
content: Return pickups are available in select locations. Provide the order ID and preferred pickup time window.

title: Exchange Policy
content: Exchanges are allowed within 7 days for eligible items. Share the order ID and the replacement item or size.

title: Gift Cards
content: Gift cards are delivered by email and can be redeemed at checkout. Gift cards are non-refundable.

title: Wallet Refunds
content: Wallet refunds are credited within 24 hours after approval. You can use the wallet balance on your next purchase.

title: UPI Refunds
content: UPI refunds are processed to the same UPI ID used at checkout. Bank processing may take 1 to 3 business days.

title: Chargebacks
content: If a chargeback is initiated, order investigations may pause. Contact support to resolve disputes before filing a chargeback.

title: Taxes and GST
content: Invoices include applicable taxes. If you need GST details on the invoice, share your billing information with support.

title: Loyalty Points
content: Loyalty points are credited after delivery. Points can be used on future orders and may expire after 90 days.

title: Coupon Expiry
content: Coupons expire at 11:59 PM local time on the listed end date. Expired coupons cannot be reactivated.

title: Size Guide
content: Use the size guide on each product page. If you need help, share your measurements and item name.

title: Product Care
content: Care instructions are listed on the product page or label. If you cannot find them, share the product name for guidance.

title: Account Deletion
content: Account deletion requests are processed within 7 business days. Pending orders must be completed before deletion.

title: Security Verification
content: Some requests require identity verification to protect accounts. Support may ask for order details or last 4 digits of the card.

title: Product Availability
content: Availability varies by location and warehouse stock. Share your city or postal code to check eligibility.

title: Store Credit
content: Store credit is issued for eligible returns if requested. Store credit does not expire and can be used on any item.

title: Holiday Delays
content: During holidays, delivery times may extend by 2 to 4 business days. We recommend ordering early for time-sensitive gifts.

title: Packaging
content: Orders are shipped in protective packaging. Gift wrapping is not available unless stated on the product page.

title: Contact Support
content: To contact support, share your order ID, issue summary, and preferred contact method. Response times are typically within 24 hours.

title: Delivery Tracking
content: Customers can track orders using an order ID such as ORD12345. Most orders are delivered within 3 to 5 business days after shipping.

title: Support Hours
content: Customer support is available Monday to Saturday from 9 AM to 6 PM. Support is closed on major public holidays.

title: Replacement Policy
content: Product replacements are available for damaged, defective, or incorrect items. Customers should provide an order ID and a short description of the issue.

title: Payment Help
content: If payment fails but money is deducted, customers should wait 24 hours. If the money is not reversed, they should contact support with the transaction ID.

title: Order Cancellation
content: Orders can be canceled within 1 hour of placement. After that, cancellation depends on whether the order has shipped. Provide the order ID to check eligibility.

title: Change Delivery Address
content: Address updates are possible before the order ships. Share the order ID and the new address details to request a change.

title: Shipping Fees
content: Standard shipping is free on orders above $50. Orders below $50 have a flat shipping fee of $4.99.

title: Express Shipping
content: Express shipping delivers in 1 to 2 business days after dispatch. Availability depends on the destination and inventory.

title: International Shipping
content: International shipping is available to select countries. Delivery times range from 7 to 14 business days, and customs duties may apply.

title: Order Delays
content: Delays can happen due to high demand or carrier issues. If your order is past the expected delivery window, contact support with your order ID.

title: Missing Items
content: If an order arrives with missing items, contact support within 48 hours. Provide the order ID and list of missing items.

title: Damaged Items
content: Report damaged items within 7 days of delivery. Include the order ID and photos of the damage for a faster review.

title: Wrong Item Received
content: If you received the wrong item, share your order ID and a short description of what arrived. We will arrange a replacement or refund.

title: Return Policy
content: Returns are accepted within 7 days of delivery for unused items in original packaging. Provide the order ID and reason for return.

title: Refund Timeline
content: Refunds are processed within 3 to 5 business days after approval. Banks may take additional time to reflect the amount.

title: Partial Refunds
content: Partial refunds may apply for discounted bundles, missing accessories, or items returned in used condition. Support will confirm the final amount.

title: Promo Codes
content: Promo codes apply at checkout and cannot be combined unless stated. If a code fails, verify expiration and cart eligibility.

title: Invoice Request
content: Invoices are available after shipment. Request an invoice by sharing your order ID and billing name.

title: Payment Methods
content: We accept major credit cards, debit cards, and UPI. Cash on delivery is available for select locations.

title: Cash on Delivery
content: Cash on delivery is available for orders under $200. Keep exact change ready; carrier fees may apply in some areas.

title: Account Help
content: If you cannot sign in, reset your password using the email on file. For account changes, contact support with your registered email.

title: Privacy Policy
content: We use your contact details only for order updates and support. Payment details are processed by secure gateways and are not stored.

title: Warranty Information
content: Warranty coverage varies by product. Provide the order ID and product name to check warranty eligibility.

title: Subscription Pause
content: Subscriptions can be paused once per month. Provide the subscription ID and the desired pause dates.

title: Subscription Cancellation
content: Subscriptions can be canceled at any time before the next billing cycle. The current cycle remains active until its end.

title: Gift Orders
content: Gift messages can be added during checkout. If you missed it, contact support quickly with your order ID.

title: Bulk Orders
content: For bulk or corporate orders, share your item list and quantity. Support will confirm pricing and timelines.

title: Out of Stock Items
content: Out of stock items may be restocked within 7 to 14 days. You can request a restock alert by contacting support.
